title: Memory Optimization in Fine-Tuning
code:
def compute_checkpoint_mem(n_layers, acts_per_layer):
    std_mem = n_layers * acts_per_layer
    check_mem = 2 * int(n_layers ** 0.5) * acts_per_layer
    return std_mem, check_mem

def run_practice():
    std, check = compute_checkpoint_mem(100, 10)
    assert std == 1000
    assert check == 200
    print('[PASS] Checkpoint memory scale calculation verified.')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    run_practice()
